behavior_in_task_description.reason: Instruction names all test specifics: --help/-h flag, --wait, --flaky, --warnings, /tmp/bun-build-{number}-{platform}-{step}.log path, buildkite.com, and CLAUDE.md update.

no_solution_leakage.reason: Instruction describes the missing behaviors but not specific code changes; agent must figure out implementation.

solution_uniqueness_guard.reason: Tests check for substrings like '--wait', '/tmp/bun-build', 'branch', etc. that any reasonable implementation would include; no internal function names or variable specifics.

tests_verify_behavior_not_text.reason: Tests execute the script via subprocess (bun run ... --help) and verify exit code and stdout, plus run prettier/oxlint/tsc/bun build.

test_not_tautological.reason: A stub that does nothing on --help would exit non-zero or print nothing; tests require substantial output with specific tokens.

behavior_in_tests.reason: Instruction explicitly requires CLAUDE.md updates with usage examples, but the config_edit f2p test bodies are empty (commented headers only); also wait polling, log fetching, failure grouping, and canceled-build handling are not tested.

informative_test_structure.reason: Tests are grouped with section comment banners (fail-to-pass, config_edit, repo_tests) and named descriptively.

structured_data_schema.reason: Task produces text/log files, not structured data with a schema.

no_typos.reason: Filenames and commands appear correct (scripts/buildkite-failures.ts, CLAUDE.md, /tmp/bun-build-*).

instruction_no_hint_leakage.reason: Instruction names the file to edit (scripts/buildkite-failures.ts) which is the natural task target, not a specific line.

config_edit_scope_bounded.reason: The config_edit f2p test placeholders are empty (just '# [config_edit] fail_to_pass' comments with no test body), so CLAUDE.md changes aren't actually verified despite being a stated requirement.
